arts.ttl: Arsenal news: Mikel Arteta gives update on triple injury blow ahead of crucial Real Madrid tie
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta gave updates on Jorginho, Thomas Partey and Ben White after Arsenal were held to a frustrating 1-1 draw by Brentford in the Premier League on Saturday

arts.ttl: White, Partey, Jorginho - Arsenal injury news and return dates ahead of Real Madrid second leg - football.london
arts.sum: What Arteta has said: "Ben White couldn’t be in the squad because he felt something again post-training yesterday, so that limits the solutions we have because Jurrien wasn’t ready to start the game either. What Arteta has said: "Calafiori unfortunately picked up a knee injury with his national team.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Gabriel Martinelli fumes over 'nasty' tackle that 'could have broke my leg' after Brentford's Christian Norgaard escaped red card in 1-1 stalemate
arts.sum: Gabriel Martinelli has hit out at a 'nasty' tackle from Christian Norgaard that he claims 'could have broke my leg', after the Brentford midfielder escaped a red card during Arsenal's 1-1 draw at the Emirates.

arts.ttl: Thomas Partey injury worry for Arsenal as title hopes hit hard by Brentford draw
arts.sum: Partey scored for the Gunners but had to be withdrawn with 20 minutes remaining.

Yoane Wissa’s 16th goal of the season earned Brentford a deserved point at the Emirates Stadium. Here’s how we rated each Bees player in the 1-1 draw with Arsenal. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta and Gabriel Martinelli fume at Christian Norgaard scissor tackle: ‘He could have broken my leg’
arts.sum: Arsenal were held to a 1-1 draw by Brentford to lose even more ground in the title race

arts.ttl: Arsenal’s title hopes take another hit as Brentford come from behind to draw
arts.sum: Thomas Partey opened the scoring for Arsenal but the visitors responded through Yoane Wissa.

arts.ttl: Arsenal drop points to Brentford as Liverpool edge closer to title - 5 talking points
arts.sum: ARSENAL 1-1 BRENTFORD: Thomas Partey had given Arsenal the lead just after the hour mark, but Yoane Wissa grabbed Brentford's equaliser with 16 minutes left

arts.ttl: Premier League issue statement as new VAR system intervenes at Arsenal vs Brentford
arts.sum: The Premier League brought in semi-automated offsides this week and the new system made its mark at the Emirates Stadium on Saturday evening during Arsenal's clash with Brentford

arts.ttl: Arsenal v Brentford line-ups: Janelt in for Bees
arts.sum: Brentford make just one change from the side which drew with Chelsea – Vitaly Janelt comes into the midfield, with Yehor Yarmoliuk dropping to the bench. Gustavo Nunes, in the squad after his injury lay-off, is on the bvench. Arsenal: Raya, Partey, Saliba, Kiwior, Tierney, Jorginho, Zinchenko, Rice, Nwaneri, Martinelli, Trossard.
